form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last outing favourite; won by 5 len at this track March 10 over 1000m defeating Uptown Girl carrying 56kg at $4.30. At only start last preparation ran last of 9 at this track on September 16 over 1000m, on heavy track; 20 len behind Eau De Parfum with 58kg at $10.90. Big chance to make it back-to-back wins. Improver with winning prospects.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at this track on February 24 over 1000m, on heavy track; 22 len behind Vim De Bage with 58kg at $17.90. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at this track on April 8 over 1000m, 6 len behind Grazella carrying 56kg at $96.80. Must improve significantly.

form.formComment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at this track January 26 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 3.5 len behind Vida Bela carrying 56kg at $11.10. On debut eighth of 10 at Taruma October 20 2024 over 1100m, in the wet; 24 len behind Francesca Queen with 57kg at $4.40. Could prove too smart for these.
